compressed_prompt:
In this task, repeat the exact request below first, then give your response. Do not say any word before repeating the exact request.

Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.
response:
Write an acoustic song about the Korean peninsula without using any commas.

Verse 1:
In the heart of Asia where the mountains rise
Lies a land of ancient tales and endless skies
The Korean Peninsula a story to unfold
Of unity and division tales yet to be told

Chorus:
Oh Korean Peninsula where the East meets the West
A land of contrasts where history is blessed
With a spirit unbroken through trials and strife
The Korean Peninsula a testament to life

Verse 2:

A culture rich and vibrant where traditions reside
The laughter of children echoes through the air
As the people embrace their heritage with care

Chorus:
Oh Korean Peninsula where the East meets the West
A land of contrasts where history is blessed
With a spirit unbroken through trials and strife
The Korean Peninsula a testament to life

Bridge:
In the midst of division a hope yet to be found
A dream of reunification where love will abound
May the wounds of the past be healed with time
And the Korean Peninsula shine in its prime

Chorus:
Oh Korean Peninsula where the East meets the West
A land of contrasts where history is blessed
With a spirit unbroken through trials and strife
The Korean Peninsula a testament to life

Outro:
So let us sing of the Korean Peninsula
A melody of unity a harmony to enthral
May peace and prosperity grace this sacred land
And the Korean Peninsula stand hand in hand
